description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image, with two stages code_style and tests. Add a stable_code_latest job in the code_style stage that runs a before_script "rustup component add rustfmt" and then executes the script "cargo fmt --all -- --check". Add a latest job in the tests stage that runs the script "rustc --version && cargo --version" followed by "cargo test --all --verbose". No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
